meaning: n.弗恩(Vernon 的异体 亦作 Verne)(m.)
examples: Vern blinks with uncomprehension as the Insurance Guy tells him they won't cover him.
Founder and CEO Vern Raburn says he'll ship 250 or more jets this year.
The 52, 000-square-foot structure is a dream taking shape for Vern Raburn, chief executive of Eclipse Aviation.
